name: 40 Inch Black Number 2 Balloon Jumbo Giant Happy 2th 12th 20th 21st Birthday Party Decorations for Birthday Huge Mylar Anniversary Party Supplies
bullets: 1.Premium Quality: Our Black number 2 balloons are made of high-quality Mylar Foil material,The balloons are perfect for celebrating a 2nd birthday or a surprise 2 wedding anniversary party. allowing them to hang stably on walls or decorations without compromising their integrity. whether for photography, decoration, or other special occasions. The high-quality material also allows the balloons to maintain their shape and color for an extended period, making them a great choice for both indoor and outdoor events.

2.Stunning Number Balloon: This 40 inch vibrant Black foil balloon is the perfect addition to any party, creating a magical backdrop for your guests to capture unforgettable memories. Whether you're celebrating a 2 year birthday, a milestone, or even an 2 anniversary, this Black number balloon will add a touch of elegance and style to your event.

3.Multiple Color & Number Options: Choose from a wide range of 0-9 number balloons in various colors to match your party theme. Our Black balloons are just one option; we also offer blue ,pink,black,rose Black, white and other eye-catching colors. Whether you're celebrating teen, or adult, there's a 40-inch digital balloon that will make your party unforgettable

4.Easy to Use :This 40-inch digital balloon is designed to be simple to use. Use The Plastic Straw In The Packaging to Inflate The Balloon (Or Use an Inflation Pump）The self-sealing feature ensures the balloon stays inflated for hours, making it a convenient and time-saving party accessory. Just locate the arrow tab, pull it open, and enjoy the perfect amount of air for a stunning display.

5.Wide Range of Applications: These colorful number balloons are not only perfect for birthday parties, showers, and themed events but also ideal for weddings, anniversaries, celebrations, and more. Use them alone or combine with other decorations to create a fancy and memorable party atmosphere. Their versatility makes them a great choice for indoor or outdoor events.
